title: Union by rank is balanced: rank-r tree has 2^r nodes
statement_informal: A union-by-rank tree of rank r has at least 2^r elements (N(r)=2*N(r-1)), so its rank is at most lg n and find/union are O(log n).

cost_model.notes: Rank-r tree has >= 2^r nodes => rank <= lg n => find is O(log n).

references: Tarjan; Knuth TAOCP — disjoint-set union (union by rank).
